allow: Bash(DASHSCOPE_API_KEY="" python -c "from astra_pro.config import settings; print\('OK, dashscope_api_key:', repr\(settings.dashscope_api_key\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from astra_pro.main import app; print\('Import OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p,'-',d['paths'][p].get\('get',{}\).get\('summary',''\) or d['paths'][p].get\('post',{}\).get\('summary',''\)\) for p in d['paths']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Title:', d['info']['title']\); print\('Description:', d['info']['description']\); [print\(f'  {p}: {d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"get\\",{}\).get\(\\"summary\\",\\"\\"\) or d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"post\\",{}\).get\(\\"summary\\",\\"\\"\)}  tags={d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"get\\",{}\).get\(\\"tags\\",\\"\\"\) or d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"post\\",{}\).get\(\\"tags\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for p in d['paths']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Title:', d['info']['title']\); print\('Description:', d['info']['description']\); [print\(f'  {p}: {d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"get\\",{}\).get\(\\"summary\\",\\"\\"\) or d[\\"paths\\"][p].get\(\\"post\\",{}\).get\(\\"summary\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for p in d['paths']]")
